name: Data_Segmentation

documentation.description:
Data_Segmentation
-------------------

  Pure Ada 2012+ code, 100% portable: OS-, CPU- and compiler- independent.

  The Data_Segmentation package offers tools for splitting data into more
  homogeneous blocks, with the hope of compressing those blocks better.

subtypes.name: Positive_Index
subtypes.code: subtype Positive_Index is Index range 1 .. Index'Last;

subprograms.name: Segment_by_Entropy
subprograms.code: procedure Segment_by_Entropy (buffer : in Buffer_Type; seg : out Segmentation)

generic_instantiations.name: Index_Vectors
generic_instantiations.code: package Index_Vectors is new Ada.Containers.Vectors (Positive, Positive_Index);

formals.name: Buffer_Type
formals.code: type Buffer_Type is array (Index range <>) of Alphabet;
